message:
Add SSH and Cloudflare Workers packs

SSH pack (remote.ssh):
- 6 destructive patterns for remote command execution via SSH
- 10 safe patterns: version checks, key listing, keyscan, agent ops, help
- Protects against dangerous commands tunneled through SSH connections

Cloudflare Workers pack (cdn.cloudflare_workers):
- Protections for wrangler CLI operations
- Covers secret deletion, KV namespace deletion, D1 database operations

Closes: git_safety_guard-1gv, git_safety_guard-woe, git_safety_guard-ksk.2, git_safety_guard-ksk.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
